overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through ancient Alexandria. The character moves from a garden courtyard through monumental architecture including a circular colonnade and fortified gates, then crosses a bridge with triumphal arches toward the Pharos lighthouse. The scene features bright Mediterranean sunlight and historic stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard garden with stone paving and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a garden courtyard toward a wide stone staircase

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a stone bench under the trees

entered.detail: round stone monument with columns and domed roof at the top of the stairs
wide stone staircase leading upward to the monument
tall stone wall with decorative urns on top
tall palm tree visible above the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit garden courtyard with cobblestone paving and scattered trees. A circular colonnade monument sits at the top of a wide stone staircase ahead, while a single NPC sits on a bench to the right. The garden wall runs along the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to elevated monument

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the circular colonnade structure at the top

entered.detail: tall stone retaining wall casting striped shadows
wooden bench positioned under the colonnade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide marble staircase flanked by stone walls. The circular colonnade draws closer as the camera climbs, passing a wooden bench tucked under the monument's edge. The garden wall and palm trees fall behind as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with fortified gate and bell tower

events.description: exits the garden monument area and enters an open plaza with a fortified gate structure
begins ascending the second set of stairs toward the gate archway

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward a large fortified gate, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: citizen in white tunic walking toward the camera
guard standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: large stone gate with archway and crenellated top
tall square stone tower with wooden balcony and arched windows
wide stone stairs leading up to the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit plaza featuring a fortified stone gate and a tall bell tower with wooden balconies. The character walks toward the gate, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction, then begins ascending the stairs leading to the archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: triumphal arch bridge with harbor and lighthouse view

events.description: passes through the gate onto a wide bridge with triumphal arches overlooking the harbor
mounted NPC on camel passes by from behind and moves ahead
second mounted NPC on camel passes by from the right side

agents.ego_description: walking across the bridge toward the lighthouse, passing under triumphal arches and alongside mounted travelers

notable_agents.action: rider on camel passing by and moving ahead toward the arch
person sitting on the bridge wall overlooking the water

entered.detail: massive stone triumphal arch with decorative entablature and columns
tall white lighthouse with smoke rising from the beacon at the top
classical marble statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
stone balustrade along the edge of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide bridge lined with classical statues and stone railings, passing under a massive triumphal arch. The Pharos lighthouse dominates the right side of the view across the harbor, with smoke rising from its beacon. Mounted travelers on camels pass by as the character continues toward a second arch in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded garden courtyard into the monumental public architecture of ancient Alexandria. It begins by moving across sunlit cobblestones and past scattered trees toward a circular colonnade, before ascending a wide marble staircase that lifts the perspective above the garden walls. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens into a bustling plaza featuring a fortified stone gate and a tall bell tower with wooden balconies. The movement then flows through the archway and onto a wide bridge lined with classical statues, passing under a massive triumphal arch. Finally, the view expands across the harbor to reveal the towering Pharos lighthouse with smoke rising from its beacon as mounted travelers on camels pass by.
